content.summary: Both Layer 2 validations failed due to infrastructure/routing problems, not implementation issues.

clawd-r0y.issue: Rate limiting code exists (27/27 unit tests pass) but feature doesn't work on test server. No 429 responses, no rate limiting triggered after 5+ failed logins.
clawd-r0y.root_cause: Rate limiter not being invoked in actual NextAuth flow

clawd-4io.issue: Cannot access logged-in state to test logout button. Login works but redirects to /projects which 404s.

content.impact: All feature validation blocked until routing infrastructure is fixed
content.recommendation: Focus on fixing BDV2 deployment routing before continuing feature work. The rate limiting integration also needs debugging.
actions_taken: clawd-r0y: Status changed to in_progress with failure notes
clawd-4io: Status remains needs-validation but marked BLOCKED
Both beads have detailed comments documenting issues
